channel.title: Hutch
channel.description: Updates for Hutch — multi-tool macOS utility from Coursion.

item.title: Version 0.4.14
item.description: • ### New in 0.4.14 - **Run Shortcuts & AppleScripts from Pounce** — Run a Shortcut or AppleScript by name straight from the launcher (⌘⏎ edits/reveals). Type "shortcuts" or "scripts" to list them all. - **Tune your Pounce sources** — New panel to drag-reorder which source wins, switch sources off, set a per-source minimum query length, and bias ranking weight. - **Stash copy & reference modes** — Pick Move, Copy, or Reference per drop from a segmented control in the shelf — and long-press the menu bar icon to summon the shelf. - **iCloud settings sync** — Opt in to sync Toggles, Window Manager, Browser Picker, Stash, and Pounce settings across your Macs via iCloud Drive. - **Browser Picker hotkey** — Assign a shortcut that opens the picker for the link on your clipboard. - **Tool status at a glance** — The Toggles panel shows a live active/inactive chip for every Hutch tool. - **What's New** — Release notes after every update.

item.title: Version 0.4.13
item.description: • ### New in 0.4.13 - **Pounce — Recent files:** New source surfacing files you opened recently, system-wide and ranked by last use. Toggle under Settings → Pounce → Sources. - **Pounce — Source ranking:** Weight which sources surface first with per-source sliders (Settings → Pounce → Source ranking). - **Pounce — AI providers:** A Test Connection button validates your endpoint, model, and key on save; new show/hide toggle on the API key field.

item.title: Version 0.4.12
item.description: • Fixed calculator crash on incomplete expressions; Pounce ranks app names higher so second-word matches like chrome for Google Chrome surface first.

item.title: Version 0.4.11
item.description: • Pounce: port killer — type 'ports' or 'kill port 3000' to find and kill processes on listening TCP ports

item.title: Version 0.4.10
item.description: • Focus Mode toggle, Camera/Mic In Use privacy indicators, Window Manager drag-to-snap with preview overlay and per-app snap presets

item.title: Version 0.4.8
item.description: Fix intermittent crash on macOS 26 (Tahoe) during launcher and menu-bar interactions.

item.title: Version 0.4.7
item.description: Redesigned onboarding with per-tool deep-dives, cheat-sheet HUD, and hotkey conflict detection.

item.title: Version 0.3.1
item.description: Pounce v2 — recents, running-app dot, switch-vs-launch, modifier hints, clipboard history, custom commands, calculator, conversions (live FX), markdown preview, music control, recent downloads, window switcher (jumps to specific window), inline window-snap commands, web-search bangs (g/gh/w/npm/yt/mdn/so/amz/map), URL/email detection, iOS simulator picker with inline Boot/Shutdown/Delete buttons, Reset Audio + Xcode-junk cleanup actions, AI prompts via your own Anthropic/OpenAI/Ollama keys (Keychain-stored), help cheatsheet ("?" inside Pounce). Plus a wake-fix for Window Manager hotkeys clobbering Pounce/Stash/Toggles.

item.title: Version 0.2.3
item.description: Toggles panel rows now light up in their semantic color (Dark Mode indigo, Keep Awake orange, Lock Screen red, etc.) instead of the global accent. Plus an in-app banner when a Sparkle update is found.

item.title: Version 0.1.4
item.description: Polish: Permissions sidebar attention dot is a single circle with a soft amber glow — properly centered. More from us: AIStats now links to its Mac App Store page.
